pi_items.source: ADempiere GitBook documentation (https://adempiere.gitbook.io/docs/) explicitly lists Joe Block as a business partner in Garden World demo data
Task specification in task.json; realistic currency amount for check payment
Task specification in task.json; realistic check number format
iDempiere 12.0 API Documentation (X_C_Payment class) shows TENDERTYPE_Check = 'K' (https://jenkins-artifacts.idempiere.org/javadoc12/org/compiere/model/X_C_Payment.html)
iDempiere documentation and forum discussions confirm IsReceipt 'Y' = AR Receipt (payment received from customers), 'N' = AP Payment (payment to vendors)
iDempiere 12.0 API Documentation (X_C_Payment class) shows DOCSTATUS_Completed = 'CO'

privileged_info_summary: Joe Block is a confirmed business partner in iDempiere's standard GardenWorld demo database. The payment record should have tender type 'K' (Check), an amount of $1,750.00, check number 20251547, isReceipt flag 'Y' (indicating an AR/Accounts Receivable Receipt), and final document status 'CO' (Completed). These field codes are standard iDempiere payment system constants verified through official API documentation.
